# Overlay Killer

> Browser extension for Chrome and Firefox that removes annoying overlays and restores scrollbars on websites.

Overlay Killer removes cookie consent overlays, newsletter popups, and other obstructive page elements that prevent users from accessing web content. It also restores scroll functionality that some sites disable.

## Key Features
- Removes cookie consent overlays and popups automatically
- Restores scrollbars blocked by overlay scripts
- Works on Chrome (MV3) and Firefox
- No configuration needed — works automatically

## Source
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/cocodedk/overlay-killer)
- [Releases](https://github.com/cocodedk/overlay-killer/releases)
